name: Mining Operations
description: Mining operations with locations, personnel, permits, inspections, environmental readings, and production.

forms.name: Permits
forms.description: Mining and environmental permits and licenses

workflows.name: Permits Status Logger
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Closed" value="@values['Status'] == 'Closed'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task><task type="Complete" label="Not Closed" value="@values['Status'] != 'Closed'">utilities_echo_v1_2</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Closure" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="100" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">permits closed at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task><task name="Log Status" id="utilities_echo_v1_2" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="350" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">permits status: <%= @values['Status'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

forms.name: Obligations
forms.description: Legal and regulatory obligations tied to permits

workflows.name: Issues Submitted Validation
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Submission" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">issues submitted: <%= @values.to_a.map{|k,v| k.to_s + ': ' + v.to_s}.join(', ') %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Issues Escalation Check
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Critical" value="@values['Priority'] == 'Critical' || @values['Severity'] == 'Critical'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task><task type="Complete" label="Normal" value="@values['Priority'] != 'Critical' && @values['Severity'] != 'Critical'">utilities_echo_v1_2</task></dependents></task><task name="Escalation Alert" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="100" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">ESCALATION: issues priority=<%= @values['Priority'] %> severity=<%= @values['Severity'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task><task name="Normal" id="utilities_echo_v1_2" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="350" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">issues updated, priority normal</parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Inspections Status Logger
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Closed" value="@values['Status'] == 'Closed'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task><task type="Complete" label="Not Closed" value="@values['Status'] != 'Closed'">utilities_echo_v1_2</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Closure" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="100" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">inspections closed at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task><task name="Log Status" id="utilities_echo_v1_2" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="350" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">inspections status: <%= @values['Status'] %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Auto Timestamp
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Created" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">Record created at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %> by <%= @created_by %> on form <%= @form_slug %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Submission Notification
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Format Notification" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>false</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">New submission by <%= @submitted_by %> on form <%= @form_slug %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>
